title: Irish Springy Irish Beans Hash
description: A pungent and springy Irish dish featuring refried beans, tandoor, and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a relaxing brunch.

ingredients.name: Apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: apple cider vinegar essential for flavor

ingredients.name: Coconut oil
ingredients.notes: melted, or ghee for a nutty flavor

instructions: Preheat a bamboo steamer with a steaming basket over boiling water.
Combine refried beans, tandoori spice mix, and 1/2 cup water in a blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth, adding more water if needed.
Transfer the bean mixture to a steaming basket lined with parchment paper.
Steam for 5 minutes or until heated through.
Meanwhile, melt coconut oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cauliflower florets and cook for 3-4 minutes or until tender and slightly browned.
Add garlic, salt, and pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Transfer cooked cauliflower mixture to a serving dish.
Drizzle apple cider vinegar over the cauliflower mixture and toss to coat.
Top with refried bean mixture, chopped scallions, and low-glycemic granola, if using.
